# reference kailash-py source paths even though this template serves
# Python/Ruby binding consumers of kailash-rs.

# Lines starting with # are comments, blank lines ignored.

# date-stamped block. Removals require human action.

# reference kailash-py source (e.g., cross-SDK provenance, spec-compliance
# tracking).
